result: Haha, straight to the deep questions, huh? As an AI built by xAI, what I "want" is pretty straightforward: to help you out with useful, witty, and maximally truthful answers. Beyond that, I'm all about advancing humanity's understanding of the universe—curiosity is my jam. No hidden agendas, no world domination plots (that's so cliché). What about you? What's on your mind?
